narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 4-B (precinct in Huron County) has 512 registered voters, with 68.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.3 percentage points.
